message:
feat(abi): convert 16 glibc IO vtable stubs from call-through to native no-ops

Convert _IO_default_doallocate, _IO_doallocbuf, _IO_file_doallocate,
_IO_default_finish, _IO_file_finish, _IO_file_init, _IO_init,
_IO_init_marker, _IO_init_wmarker, _IO_marker_delta,
_IO_marker_difference, _IO_remove_marker, _IO_seekmark,
_IO_seekwmark, _IO_unsave_markers, _IO_unsave_wmarkers, and related
FILE list/backup/lock functions from GlibcCallThrough (dynamic
io_resolve! dispatch) to intentional native implementations.

Each conversion is documented with a rationale comment explaining why
a no-op or constant return is correct for the frankenlibc execution
model. Moves native coverage from ~96.7% to ~97.1%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
